raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Over 740,000 Californians rely on the IHSS program for essential domestic long-term care services.",
    "The current supply of care providers is unable to meet the demand in California.",
    "The IHSS program provides a cost-effective alternative to institutional care in California.",
    "AB 2704 aims to shift the financial burden of criminal background checks for IHSS providers from individuals to the Department of Justice.",
    "The costs of criminal background checks for IHSS providers can amount to as much as $75.",
```
